Home
  Careers
Careers

Our work makes a life-changing difference for kids in backyards across northern Alberta and beyond. And now, as we help build the future of children’s health with No Bounds, there’s never been a more exciting time to join our team.

On this page
About us
Job opportunities
Other ways to get involved
Creating bright futures

We believe in dreams and possibilities. Children inspire us to grow, to contribute and to exceed our potential. They motivate us to think big, seek new opportunities and innovative solutions, to embrace change and try new things.

Everything we do is for Stollery kids and their families.

As we support world-class care at the Stollery today and help bring a new stand-alone Stollery to life for the future, we’re looking for people who are energized by purpose and ready to make a real impact.

Our culture

As a member of our team, you’ll work in a trust-based, collaborative culture, with solution-focused team members who encourage ideas, take initiative, embrace change and celebrate successes.

We are proud to foster a workplace that values compassion, inclusion and diversity. We welcome and encourage all applicants who want to help shape the future of children’s health — with No Bounds.

Current openings
